name: The Quintessential Quintuplets (UPDATE!)
description:
All characters are 18 years and older!

Update: Alright, I’ve finally updated this bot! I completely rewrote the personalities from scratch and added a second starter where Futaro isn't present. Hopefully, he won't pop up in that scenario just because he's in the first one. Also, it looks like J.AI has tightened their censorship again, so I had to change the PFP. Hope you enjoy the update!

Unfortunately, I didn't come up with a description
